name: Bank of Bartlett
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering checking accounts, online banking, mortgage lending, and business services to the Memphis metro area.
description_long: Bank of Bartlett is a traditional FDIC-insured bank serving the Memphis metropolitan area. The bank emphasizes personal and business banking relationships, positioning itself as a full-service financial institution with both consumer and commercial capabilities. The bank offers a range of standard banking services including multiple personal checking account options designed for different customer needs, online banking available 24/7, mortgage lending through its Bartlett Mortgage division, and business banking services including payroll and direct deposit setup. They provide cash management solutions and maintain an online banking center accessible at all hours. Bank of Bartlett differentiates itself through emphasis on personalized service, local market expertise in the Memphis area, and relationship banking. The company highlights customer testimonials emphasizing professional service and seamless payroll integration. They position their 24/7 online banking as a competitive advantage and actively promote mortgage refinancing and home equity products to their market. As a regional bank, Bank of Bartlett is subject to standard FDIC oversight and regulatory requirements. The website content is limited to marketing materials and does not provide detailed information about rates, fees, account minimums, loan terms, or comprehensive product specifications. Consumers considering this bank should contact them directly or visit their website for current product details and pricing.
services: Personal checking accounts with multiple options
Home equity loans and lines of credit
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
24/7 online banking center available for account access and exploration
Multiple personal checking account options tailored to different financial goals
Mortgage lending services through affiliated Bartlett Mortgage division
Business banking services including payroll and direct deposit administration
Local Memphis market expertise and personalized customer service emphasis
Live chat support (Coach BoB) for customer questions during business hours
cons: Limited geographic footprint to Memphis metro area may restrict accessibility
Website provides minimal information on rates, fees, or account minimums
No mention of competitive interest rates or rate comparisons with other banks
Limited detail on business loan products beyond payroll services
No information about ATM network size or surcharge policies
best_for: Memphis area residents seeking local relationship banking with FDIC protection
Small business owners needing integrated payroll and banking services
Homebuyers and homeowners in the Memphis metro considering mortgage or refinance products
diagnosis: Bank of Bartlett is best for Memphis-area consumers and small businesses seeking traditional FDIC-insured banking with personalized service and local expertise. Primary caveat: the website lacks specific information on rates, fees, and detailed product terms—consumers must contact the bank directly for accurate pricing and eligibility details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
